_comment: Vectorizer backpressure panel definitions (issue #263). Drop these into an existing Grafana dashboard's `panels` array, or import as a standalone row. Datasource UID is hardcoded to 'Prometheus' to match docs/grafana/vectorizer-dashboard.json — replace if your environment uses a different UID.

panels.title: Upsert queue depth (per collection)
panels.description: Per-collection in-flight upsert depth. Sustained growth means the producer is faster than the writer can drain. Hard limit is configured via `backpressure.upsert_queue_hard_limit` (default 1024).

panels.title: Vocab-build permits available
panels.description: Free permits on the global BM25 vocab-build semaphore. `0` for sustained windows = writers are queued and CPU is the bottleneck. Capacity is `backpressure.max_concurrent_vocab_builds` (0 = num_cpus).

panels.title: Upsert rejections / sec (by reason)
panels.description: `queue_full` = HTTP 429 / gRPC RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED returned to the client. `queue_high_water_warn` = depth crossed the high-water mark but admit still succeeded — leading indicator. SDKs honor Retry-After automatically; sustained `queue_full` rate means the producer needs throttling or the hard limit needs raising.

panels.title: BM25 empty-vocabulary fallbacks / sec
panels.description: Counter is incremented on every empty-vocab fallback regardless of warn rate-limit. Sustained > 0 for an established collection means vocabulary never built — check that file_loader's `build_vocabulary_gated` step completed.
